# Familial

> A private social network for families — share moments, plan events, and stay close without algorithms, ads, or tracking.

Familial is built by Familial, LLC (Arizona, USA). It offers chronological feeds, private circles, shared family fridges, photo albums, events, and messaging — all without behavioral tracking or advertising.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Familial and how it works.
- [About](/about): Our story, mission, and values.
- [Support](/support): Help center and contact.
- [Blog](/blog): Updates and family connection tips.
- [Careers](/careers): Join the Familial team.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of Familial.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookies): Our minimal cookie usage.

## Optional

- [Sign in or sign up](/auth): Account access.
